prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年最低位次分别为约7145名、5925名、4910名、3676名、4096名。2021-2024年呈持续前移趋势（从7145名前移至3676名），但2025年出现明显后移，较2024年后移约420名。2025年基准位次约4096名；该校在上海市招生计划波动较大：2021年14人→2022年29人→2023年28人→2024年26人→2025年18人→2026年24人。2026年较2025年扩招6人，增幅约33.3%，扩招幅度显著，按供需关系将导致竞争格局变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第23名，近年稳定在21-25名区间，属于国内顶尖工科院校，对高分考生有较强吸引力；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件；抖音热度评价为一般（总排名第74位），短视频平台曝光度中等；未见明显投档断档记录；拥有航空宇航科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A+、材料科学与工程A+、机械工程A等7个A-及以上学科，在航空航天、计算机、材料等领域具有全国领先实力，王牌专业吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度持续偏高；上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约35.4%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧；西北工业大学位于陕西省西安市，属西部高校，在上海属于异地招生。该校在上海招生规模较小（18-29人），本地考生对西部高校的地域偏好可能影响报考热度，但学校顶尖工科实力可部分抵消地域劣势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招33.3%以及上海市考生数激增35.4%等多重因素：扩招使位次数字增大（竞争难度增加），而考生数大幅增加进一步加剧竞争，两者共同推高位次。学校顶尖工科实力和优势学科吸引力形成一定支撑，但考生规模激增是更主导的因素。预测2026年最低位次约5000名，区间4500-5500名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 航空航天类（黄玉珊航空班）
- 航空航天类（智慧三航拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 暂无（2026年上海招生仅3个专业，一档已覆盖2个王牌专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 海洋工程类（水下智能系统）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4500-5500名内，建议以海洋工程类为主力填报（招生18人，录取概率最高），航空航天类黄玉珊航空班和智慧三航拔尖班作为冲刺志愿；位次明显优于区间下限（4500名以内）可重点冲刺航空航天类王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 7145, 5925, 4910, 3676, and 4096 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous forward trend (moving from 7145 to 3676), but in 2025, there was a significant backward shift, moving back about 420 places compared to 2024. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4096. The university's enrollment plan in Shanghai fluctuates significantly: 2021: 14 students → 2022: 29 → 2023: 28 → 2024: 26 → 2025: 18 → 2026: 24. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 6 students, a growth of about 33.3%, which is a significant expansion. According to supply and demand, this will lead to changes in the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 23rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 21-25 range in recent years, belonging to the top domestic engineering universities, with strong appeal to high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents. Douyin popularity evaluation is average (overall ranking 74th), with moderate exposure on short video platforms. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. It has 7 A- or above disciplines including Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A, etc., with national leading strength in aerospace, computer science, materials, and other fields, and strong appeal of flagship majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication remains high. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam candidates in Shanghai is about 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, with a significant growth in candidate numbers and intensified competition. Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, belonging to a western university, and is an out-of-town enrollment in Shanghai. The university's enrollment scale in Shanghai is small (18-29 students), and local candidates' regional preference for western universities may affect application enthusiasm, but the university's top engineering strength can partially offset the regional disadvantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the backward trend in rankings in 2025, the significant enrollment expansion of 33.3% in 2026, and the surge of 35.4% in the number of candidates in Shanghai: expansion increases the ranking number (increases competition difficulty), while the sharp increase in candidate numbers further intensifies competition, both pushing up the ranking. The university's top engineering strength and advantageous disciplines provide some support, but the surge in candidate numbers is the more dominant factor. Predict the minimum ranking for 2026 to be about 5000, with a range of 4500-5500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Aerospace Engineering (Huang Yushan Aviation Class)
- Aerospace Engineering (Smart Three Aviation Top Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- None (2026 Shanghai enrollment only has 3 majors, Tier 1 already covers 2 flagship majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Ocean Engineering (Underwater Intelligent Systems).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4500-5500, it is recommended to use Ocean Engineering as the main choice for application (enrolling 18 students, highest admission probability), and Aerospace Engineering Huang Yushan Aviation Class and Smart Three Aviation Top Talent Class as ambitious choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 4500), you can focus on applying for the flagship Aerospace Engineering majors.
